name: Hunsrik (Riograndenser Hunsrückisch)

ancestors.notes: Descent from Middle High German (Rhine-Franconian / Hunsrückisch dialect)
Brazilian Portuguese adstrate: loan phonology and code-switching

notes: Skeleton. Hunsrik/Riograndenser Hunsrückisch (West-Central German variety of southern Brazil), written in the standardised SWR/Wikipedia Hunsrik orthography. Rhine-Franconian reflexes: initial fortis lenition (t for d, p for b) and ⟨aa⟩=/ɔː/; long Brazilian Portuguese adstrate.

sources.author: Altenhofen, Cléo Vilson
sources.title: Hunsrückisch in Rio Grande do Sul: Ein Beitrag zur Beschreibung einer deutschbrasilianischen Dialektvarietät
sources.notes: Descriptive study of the Hunsrik dialect of Rio Grande do Sul.
